# MyPaperPop

> Custom AI coloring page generator for kids, parents, and teachers.

MyPaperPop lets you describe any character or scene in plain English and instantly generates a clean, printable coloring page (black-and-white line drawing). The app uses conversational AI so you can refine pages through follow-up messages until they are exactly what you imagined.

## What it does

- Generate custom coloring pages from text descriptions in seconds
- Refine pages through multi-turn conversation ("add a rainbow", "simplify it")
- Choose an age group (Under 4, Ages 4–7, Ages 8–11, Ages 12+) to control drawing complexity
- Browse 8 themed prompt packs: Under the Sea, Space Adventure, Dinosaur World, Enchanted Forest, Farm Animals, Birthday Party, Superhero Squad, Transportation
- Print or download pages as PNG files
- Share pages via a public link

## Pricing

- **Free tier:** 3 coloring pages per day, no credit card required, resets at midnight UTC
- **Starter Pack:** $2.99 one-time for 25 pages (₹299 in India)
- **Value Pack:** $6.99 one-time for 75 pages (₹699 in India)
- Credits never expire; no subscriptions

## Referral program

Share your referral link. When a new user signs up through your link, both of you receive 5 free credits instantly. Maximum 250 credits can be earned via referrals.

## Who it is for

- Parents who want personalized coloring activities for their children
- Teachers who need curriculum-themed printables on demand
- Kids aged 2–16 who want to see their own imagined characters come to life

## Key pages

- Homepage / app: https://mypaperpop.com
- Pricing: https://mypaperpop.com/pricing
- FAQ: https://mypaperpop.com/faq
- For parents: https://mypaperpop.com/for-parents
- For teachers: https://mypaperpop.com/for-teachers
- Coloring pages by theme: https://mypaperpop.com/coloring-pages/dinosaur-world

## Technical

- Web app (Next.js), iOS app, Android app
- Sign in with Google OAuth
- Payments via Stripe (one-time, no subscription)
- AI: xAI Grok Imagine for image generation, Google Gemini for conversation
